overall.description: A first-person walk through a rainy cyberpunk city at night in Cyberpunk 2077, descending from a neon-lit street intersection down stairs into a flooded lower alleyway with vibrant reflections. The scene features heavy rainfall, neon signage, wet urban surfaces, and transitions from open street to enclosed stairwell to narrow alley.

scene_state.functional_zone: rainy urban intersection with hotel entrance and crosswalk

events.description: pedestrians cross the wet street ahead at the illuminated crosswalk
slows while approaching the hotel entrance and stairway

agents.ego_description: walking along the rain-soaked street toward a neon-lit hotel entrance, observing the cyberpunk city surroundings

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians crossing the street in the heavy rain
vehicle with headlights visible approaching through the rain

entered.detail: hood of a yellow vehicle with rain droplets reflecting neon lights
illuminated pink neon HOTEL sign mounted on building facade
yellow striped pedestrian crossing painted on wet asphalt
large illuminated advertisement featuring a clown mascot for All Foods brand
rain-soaked street surface reflecting colorful neon lights

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rainy cyberpunk street at night, with the camera moving forward past a yellow vehicle hood toward a hotel entrance. Neon signs illuminate the wet asphalt and crosswalk where pedestrians are crossing, while a billboard with a clown mascot glows on the right side of the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: exterior metal stairway descending alongside hotel building

events.description: begins descending metal staircase from street level down to lower alleyway
ambient light decreases as the camera moves deeper into the stairwell shadow

agents.ego_description: carefully walking down a metal grate staircase beside the hotel, descending from street level to a lower alley

entered.detail: metal grate stairs with black railings leading downward alongside the building
bright red neon arrow sign pointing direction on the building wall
string of traditional red paper lanterns hanging under the building overhang

segments.scene_description: The camera transitions from the open street to a narrow stairway descending alongside the hotel building. Metal stairs with railings lead downward past red paper lanterns and neon signs, moving from the exposed rain into a more sheltered, shadowy environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: flooded lower alleyway with neon reflections and utility wires

events.description: reaches bottom of stairs and enters the flooded lower alleyway
slight turn to navigate around large puddles in the narrow alley

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow rain-soaked alley, observing the vibrant neon reflections rippling in the puddles

entered.detail: water-covered concrete alley surface with rippling rain and colorful neon reflections
vertical illuminated advertisement pillar with purple and pink neon graphics
metal security fence running along the right side of the alleyway
utility cables and wires stretching across the alley overhead

segments.scene_description: Having descended the stairs, the camera moves through a narrow flooded alleyway where heavy rain creates rippling reflections of neon lights on the water-covered ground. A purple neon poster pillar and chain-link fence line the path while overhead wires crisscross above.

scene_state.functional_zone: alleyway curving toward elevated highway underpass with distant street exit

events.description: alley opens slightly revealing elevated highway overpass structure on the right
ambient light increases slightly as the camera approaches the street exit ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing through the alley as it curves right, with an elevated highway structure visible ahead and distant vehicle lights approaching

notable_agents.action: vehicle with headlights visible in the distance approaching the alley exit

entered.detail: concrete elevated roadway structure with support pillars and metal railings
opening at the end of the alley leading back to street level with visible traffic

segments.scene_description: The final segment continues through the alley as it curves right, revealing an elevated highway overpass structure on the right side. The alley opens slightly toward a street exit ahead where distant vehicle headlights are visible, while the ground remains flooded with neon reflections from the surrounding cyberpunk cityscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bustling, neon-lit city intersection down into a secluded, flooded alleyway. It begins on a rainy street, moving past a yellow vehicle hood and a glowing clown billboard toward a hotel entrance where pedestrians cross the wet asphalt. As the camera reaches the building, the scene shifts from the open road to a narrow metal stairway, descending past red paper lanterns and into a more sheltered, shadowy environment. The path then opens into a narrow alleyway where heavy rain creates rippling reflections on the flooded ground, passing a purple neon pillar and chain-link fences under a canopy of crisscrossing wires. Finally, the camera curves right past an elevated highway overpass, moving toward a distant street exit illuminated by the headlights of oncoming vehicles.
